html_value.text:
Images used by History Tracers

This chapter lists all image directories used throughout the project, organized by source.

value.name: ANTT
value.desc: Contains original images from the Arquivo Nacional da Torre do Tombo

value.name: Antropology Peru
value.desc: Contains original images from the Museo Nacional de Arqueología y Antropología e Historia del Perú

value.name: Archive
value.desc: Contains original images from the Internet Archive

value.name: Ashmolean
value.desc: Contains original images from the Ashmolean Museum, Oxford

value.name: Athens
value.desc: Contains photos taken during a trip to Athens, Greece

value.name: Biblioteca Nacional Digital
value.desc: Contains original images from the Biblioteca Nacional Digital

value.name: Bing Zhao
value.desc: Contains original images from Dr. Bing Zhao’s paper Zhao, Bing (2015)

value.name: British Museum
value.desc: Contains original images from the British Museum

value.name: CERN
value.desc: Contains original images from European Organization for Nuclear Research CERN

value.name: Cahal Pech
value.desc: Contains photos taken during a trip to CahalPech, Belize

value.desc: Contains photos taken during a trip to Caracol, Belize

value.name: Caral
value.desc: Contains photos taken during a trip to Caral, Peru

value.name: Machu Picchu
